concepts.name: Graph
concepts.short_definition: A collection of nodes (vertices) connected by edges.

concepts.name: Weighted Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where each edge has an associated numerical value.

concepts.name: Undirected Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where edges have no direction, connecting two vertices symmetrically.

concepts.name: Connected Graph
concepts.short_definition: A graph where there is a path between every pair of vertices.

concepts.name: Spanning Tree
concepts.short_definition: A subgraph that connects all vertices of a graph with the minimum number of edges, forming a tree.

concepts.name: Minimum Spanning Tree
concepts.short_definition: A spanning tree of a weighted, undirected, connected graph with the minimum possible total edge weight.

concepts.name: Prim's Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: A greedy algorithm for finding a minimum spanning tree.

concepts.name: Kruskal's Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: A greedy algorithm for finding a minimum spanning tree.

concepts.name: Greedy Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: An algorithm that makes the locally optimal choice at each stage with the hope of finding a global optimum.

concepts.name: Disjoint Set Union
concepts.short_definition: A data structure that keeps track of a set of elements partitioned into a number of disjoint subsets.
